zh.lifeSummary: 當Garsende de Sabran comtesse de Forcalquier於1180年出生在法國藍多-盧希隆加爾薩布朗時，她的父親Rainon du Caylar26歲，母親Gersinde Forcalquier24歲。她於1193年7月與Prince Alphonse II of Prince Comte de Provence在法國普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾布-度-o艾--普洛福斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1242年在她的家鄉享年62歲，埋葬在法國普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾瓦爾拉 爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Garsende de Sabran comtesse de Forcalquier于1180年出生在法国藍多-盧希隆加爾薩布朗时，她的父亲Rainon du Caylar26岁，母亲Gersinde Forcalquier24岁。她于1193年7月与Prince Alphonse II of Prince Comte de Provence在法国普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾布-度-o艾--普洛福斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1242年在她的家乡享年62岁，埋葬在法国普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾瓦爾拉 爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sabran
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Sabin  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Sabin
meanings: English (Warwickshire and Northamptonshire): from the Middle English personal name Sabin (from Latin Sabinus; see 2 below) or its female equivalent Sabine (from Latin Sabina). In medieval England the feminine form was always more popular as a personal name.

French: from the Old French personal name Sabin, from Latin Sabinus. The name was originally referred to the Sabines, an ancient Italic people of central Italy whose name is of uncertain origin. In the 8th century BC the Romans slaughtered the Sabine menfolk and carried off the women. More influential as far as name-giving is concerned was the existence of several early Christian saints named Sabinus.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Sabháin ‘descendant of Sabhán’, a personal name based on sabh ‘cub’. As an Irish surname, this has mostly been absorbed into Savage .

en.lifeSummary: When Garsende de Sabran comtesse de Forcalquier was born in 1180, in Sabran, Gard, Languedoc-Roussillon, France, her father, Rainon du Caylar, was 26 and her mother, Gersinde Forcalquier, was 24. She married Prince Alphonse II of Prince Comte de Provence in July 1193, in Aix-en-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1242, in her hometown, at the age of 62, and was buried in La Celle, Var, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Garsende de Sabran comtesse de Forcalquier est née en 1180, à Sabran, Gard, Languedoc-Roussillon, France, son père, Rainon du Caylar, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Gersinde Forcalquier, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Prince Alphonse II of Prince Comte de Provence en juillet 1193, à Aix-en-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1242, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterrée à La Celle, Var, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France.

de.La Celle, Var, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azu: La Celle, Var, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Garsende de Sabran comtesse de Forcalquier 1180 in Sabran, Gard, Languedoc-Roussillon, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Rainon du Caylar 26 und ihre Mutter Gersinde Forcalquier 24. Sie hat im Juli 1193 in Aix-en-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Frankreich Prince Alphonse II of Prince Comte de Provence geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1242 im Alter von 62 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in La Celle, Var, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Garsende de Sabran comtesse de Forcalquier è nata il nel 1180 nel Sabran, Gard, Languedoc-Roussillon, Francia, sua padre, Rainon du Caylar, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Gersinde Forcalquier, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Prince Alphonse II of Prince Comte de Provence nel luglio 1193, nel Aix-en-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1242, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolta a La Celle, Var, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Garsende de Sabran comtesse de Forcalquierが1180年にフランスラングエドク-ロウシロンガードサブランで生まれた時，父Rainon du Caylarは26歳，母Gersinde Forcalquierは24歳であった。1193年7月にフランスプローベンセ-アルペス-クoト ド'アズルボウチェス-ドウ-ルhoンエイクス-エン-プローベンスでPrince Alphonse II of Prince Comte de Provenceと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1242年に故郷で62歳で死去し，フランスプローベンセ-アルペス-クoト ド'アズルバーラ セルにて埋葬された。

ko.La Celle, Var, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azu: 프랑스 프로븐스-알페스-co트 드'아저 바르 라 세
ko.lifeSummary: Garsende de Sabran comtesse de Forcalquier(이)가 1180년 프랑스 랭도c-루시런 가드 사란에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Rainon du Caylar(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gersinde Forcalquier(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1193년 7월 프랑스 프로븐스-알페스-co트 드'아저 부체스-드-ho니 아이스--프로븐스에서 Prince Alphonse II of Prince Comte de Provence(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1242년 그녀의 고향에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 프로븐스-알페스-co트 드'아저 바르 라 세에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Garsende de Sabran comtesse de Forcalquier nasceu em 1180, em Sabran, Gard, Languedoc-Roussillon, França, seu pai, Rainon du Caylar, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Gersinde Forcalquier, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Prince Alphonse II of Prince Comte de Provence em julho de 1193, em Aix-en-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1242, em sua cidade natal, com 62 anos, e foi sepultada em La Celle, Var, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, França.

ru.La Celle, Var, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azu: ла селл, вар, провенсе-алпес-кoт д'азур, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Garsende de Sabran comtesse de Forcalquier родилась в 1180 г. в местности сабран, гард, лангуедок-руссиллон, Франция, её отцу по имени Rainon du Caylar было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Gersinde Forcalquier, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Prince Alphonse II of Prince Comte de Provence июль 1193 г. в местности эикс-ен-провенс, боучес-ду-рoн, провенсе-алпес-кoт д'азур, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1242 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 62 лет и была похоронена в местности ла селл, вар, провенсе-алпес-кoт д'азур, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Garsende de Sabran comtesse de Forcalquier nació en 1180, en Sabran, Gard, Languedoc-Roussillon, Francia, su papá, Rainon du Caylar, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Gersinde Forcalquier, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Prince Alphonse II of Prince Comte de Provence en julio de 1193, en Aix-en-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1242, en su pueblo, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultada en La Celle, Var, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia.
